productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Casual Purple Backpack
description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It's a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs. American Tourister are proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 37 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 19 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of polyester for durability Two main zipped compartments One zipped compartment on the front with organizer pouches Two mesh open mouthed pockets on the sides for enhanced space Padded haul loop for easy carrying Two adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester for breathable comfort Branded zips and branding appliqué d on the front Back padding for comfort Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary
